description: Drawing from nature's aquatic influences, this Reegame fragrance for men from reebok promises a post-game high with its oceanic aroma. Bottled in a delectable sea blue flask, this eau de toilette has marine tones of bergamot. Quantity: 100 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
